title: SQ Professional Ambiente 3 Piece Food Warmer Insulated Casserole Hot Pot 1200ml 1600ml 2500ml Set Cream
features: Easy to clean food-safe materials - stainless steel inside and plastic outer insulation
Helps retain temperature (hot or cold) and nutritional value of food for up to 6 hours
description: ∅ 20cm x W 24cm x H 14cm / 1.2L ∅ 21.5cm x W 26cm x H 17.5cm / 1.6L ∅ 26.5cm x W 32cm x H 11cm / 2.5L The Insulated Hot Pot Set 3pc (1.2L, 1.6L, 2.5L) is the perfect solution for keeping meals hot or cold for extended periods. Designed with convenience in mind, these insulated pots with lids help retain temperature without the need for reheating. Whether at home or outdoors, these hot pots offer practical food storage and serving. Each insulated hot pot is made from 100% food grade materials and includes a superior stainless steel liner to ensure hygienic, safe use. The special PU insulation provides excellent heat retention, making them reliable hot pots to keep food warm throughout mealtimes. Featuring integrated side-handles, the pots are easy to use – easy to carry – easy to store – easy to clean, fitting into any kitchen routine. As serving dishes for hot food, they are ideal for rice, curries, soups, or even chilled desserts. These versatile keep warm serving dishes are perfect for everyday family use, festive occasions, or relaxed outdoor picnics.
